query:
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, passwordHash, role, isActive, canDelete, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn, lastRoleChange)
VALUES (
  'admin_principal',
  'Administrativo Sua Saúde Vital',
  'administrativo@suasaudevital.com.br',
  '$2b$10$hG9gY2RjHMRSGUVtscbQlO2vh0tUN8S5uyG9eY4YWMoCA9eC8qDRu',
  'admin',
  1,
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  passwordHash = '$2b$10$hG9gY2RjHMRSGUVtscbQlO2vh0tUN8S5uyG9eY4YWMoCA9eC8qDRu',
  role = 'admin',
  isActive = 1,
  canDelete = 1;
